languages.text: "Ох, Ваша Светлость... прошу прощения, я отвлеклась и не сразу вас заметила". {n}Ведка вытягивается по стойке смирно и щелкает каблуками.{/n} "Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски готова служить!"

"Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"
languages.original_text: "Ох, Ваша Светлость... прошу прощения, я отвлеклась и не сразу вас заметила". {n}Ведка вытягивается по стойке смирно и щелкает каблуками.{/n} "Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски готова служить!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

"Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"
"Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away."

"Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

"Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

languages.text: 「ああ、御{mf|殿|女}様… ごめんなさい、気を取られてすぐに気づきませんでした」
languages.original_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away."

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Bağışlayın, dikkatim dağılmıştı. Sizi bir an göremedim." {n}Vedka hazır ola geçiyor ve topuklarını vuruyor.{/n} "Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski hizmete hazırdır!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri... Bağışlayın, dikkatim dağılmıştı. Sizi bir an göremedim." {n}Vedka hazır ola geçiyor ve topuklarını vuruyor.{/n} "Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski hizmete hazırdır!"

languages.text: “啊，大人……请原谅，我方才走神了，没有立即注意到您。”{n}薇德卡啪地一声并拢脚跟，立正站好。{/n}“首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，听候差遣！”
languages.original_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

traits.locale_text: “啊，大人……请原谅，我方才走神了，没有立即注意到您。”{n}薇德卡啪地一声并拢脚跟，立正站好。{/n}“首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡，听候差遣！”

languages.text: "Oh, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... Bitte verzeiht, ich war abgelenkt und habe Euch nicht gleich gesehen." {n}Vedka nimmt Haltung an und schlägt die Hacken zusammen.{/n} "Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski, bereit zu dienen!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} ... Bitte verzeiht, ich war abgelenkt und habe Euch nicht gleich gesehen." {n}Vedka nimmt Haltung an und schlägt die Hacken zusammen.{/n} "Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski, bereit zu dienen!"

languages.text: « Oh, Votre Seigneurie… Pardonnez-moi, j'étais distraite et je ne vous ai pas {mf|vu|vue} arriver. » {n}Vedka se met au garde-à-vous et fait claquer ses talons.{/n} « Archmilitante Vedka Dunawski, à vos ordres ! »
languages.original_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

traits.locale_text: « Oh, Votre Seigneurie… Pardonnez-moi, j'étais distraite et je ne vous ai pas {mf|vu|vue} arriver. » {n}Vedka se met au garde-à-vous et fait claquer ses talons.{/n} « Archmilitante Vedka Dunawski, à vos ordres ! »

languages.text: «Oh, mi{mf|lord|lady}... Le ruego que me disculpe, estaba distraída y no l{mf|e|a} he visto llegar». {n}Vedka se cuadra y da un golpe con sus tacones.{/n} «¡Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski, lista para servirl{mf|e|a}!».
languages.original_text: "Oh, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}... I beg your pardon, I was distracted and didn't see you right away." {n}Vedka snaps to attention and clicks her heels.{/n} "Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski is ready to serve!"

traits.locale_text: «Oh, mi{mf|lord|lady}... Le ruego que me disculpe, estaba distraída y no l{mf|e|a} he visto llegar». {n}Vedka se cuadra y da un golpe con sus tacones.{/n} «¡Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski, lista para servirl{mf|e|a}!».
